name: super-ux
description: Covers UX at every project stage: ux-foundation (personas, JTBD, journeys, user stories, monetization), ux-flows (user flows + the docs/ux/screens.md UI map with Figma frames), ux-scenarios (use-case scenarios traced to flows/stories), ux-audit (code vs the chain, evidence-backed verdicts + fix plans). /ux is the single plain-language entry point; a docs/ux linter enforces no-drift; 100 tag-indexed best practices + PRN heuristics guide design.
